briefs.title: CapyChill 每日專輯｜海邊黃昏・Slow Notes by the Bay

briefs.meta: 固定海邊書桌母場景 · 10 音樂＋1 概念圖＋6 段微動畫
briefs.summary: 本批目標 30 分鐘，安排 6 段不同微動作。先只生成第 1 條基準驗收片；確認海浪、倒影、角色結構與循環正常後，才生成其餘項目。規則：30 分鐘＝6 段；45 分鐘＝8 段；60 分鐘＝10 段。

items.purpose: 30 分鐘 YouTube Lo-fi 長片
items.text: Track 1/10 — "Opening the Window". Create a 3:00–3:30 instrumental lo-fi track for one cohesive 30-minute CapyChill album titled "海邊黃昏・Slow Notes by the Bay". Mood: warm, unhurried, quietly optimistic. 70 BPM, 4/4, Rhodes piano and felt piano, warm restrained bass and soft brushed or tape-muted drums. Composition: simple four-chord welcome; introduce a small variation after 60 seconds, a calm B section near 1:30, then return to the main motif. Mix for long listening: no vocals, no spoken words, no dramatic drops, no piercing highs, no recognizable melody, no artist imitation. Leave gentle headroom and end cleanly with a 4–6 second natural tail. Environmental texture: soft sea breeze and distant water ambience, very low in the mix. This track must feel related to the other nine tracks without reusing the same lead melody.

items.purpose: 固定場景 reference
items.text: Create one high-resolution 16:9 hand-painted storybook master frame for CapyChill, ideally 3840×2160. Preserve the exact canonical composition across the entire channel: the same warm-brown capybara sits at the same wooden desk with the center of its head at about 64% of the image width, wearing the same cream headphones, facing left toward the same notebook; the same large window, desk lamp, mug, shelves and plants stay in identical positions. Camera is locked, eye-level, 35mm-equivalent wide view. Today’s album mood is 海邊黃昏・Slow Notes by the Bay; use peach sunset, muted ocean blue, warm walnut with clear golden-hour sky and calm sea. Calm original illustration, clean natural capybara anatomy. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, signature, sparkle icon or fake signage. Output one clean reference image, not a collage. Design three to five distinct animation opportunities into the still image without clutter: mug steam, curtain edge, two or three plant leaves, a thin incense stick with a small safe holder, and one tiny sleeping companion animal in a fixed bed. Each prop must have a clear resting position and must never compete with the capybara. COMPOSE FOR DUAL FORMAT: the full 16:9 frame must work as a YouTube video, and a narrow 9:16 portrait crop around the character must also work as a complete Shorts/Reels frame. The intended portrait crop spans approximately 44% to 76% of the original image width, centred near 60%. Do not draw crop guides. Inside that corridor, keep the entire head, headphones, writing paw, pencil, notebook, mug, and a tiny sleeping companion animal curled in a fixed cushion below the desk near the centre. Place the incense holder in a separate clear area just left of the notebook, with an unobstructed vertical column of air above it that never crosses the capybara silhouette, headphones, paw, mug or lamp. The portrait crop must still include a narrow slice of the window and sea, one warm light source and plant leaves, so it feels like a complete environment rather than a close-up cutout. Do not place essential storytelling details only at the far left and far right edges. Leave useful breathing room above the head and below the notebook for vertical-platform UI overlays; do not add text. This image will become an image-to-video reference, so keep clear separable layers for capybara, paws, pencil, notebook page, mug steam, incense smoke, pet, curtain, plants, window, sea, clouds and lights.

items.type: 影片 Prompt・基準驗收・海面與呼吸
items.purpose: 固定構圖微動畫
items.engine: Veo 3.1 Lite 測試 → Fast 定稿
items.text: 8-second 16:9 image-to-video from the selected CapyChill master frame. 基準驗收・海面與呼吸. STATIC STRUCTURE: locked camera; window frame, desk, shelves, lamp hardware, furniture, headphones and room geometry do not move. Preserve the character's identity, proportions and silhouette. No cut, zoom, pan or parallax. MANDATORY BASE ENVIRONMENT MOTION THROUGHOUT THE ENTIRE CLIP: the ocean is visibly alive, not a still photograph. Several small wave bands travel naturally toward shore; fine ripples change continuously; the golden reflection on the water shimmers softly in response to those ripples. Motion remains slow, subtle and physically consistent—never frozen, reversed, pulsing or moving as one flat sheet. Distant clouds drift less than one percent of the frame width. CHARACTER/PROP ACTION FOR THIS CLIP ONLY: The capybara stays in the original writing pose without moving the pencil. Only slow breathing and one soft blink. This is the validation clip: prioritize natural ocean motion, stable anatomy and a clean loop. Preserve the clear weather in the reference; do not create rain, snow, storms or new weather effects. The mug is still unless this clip explicitly mentions steam. The incense is unlit and produces no smoke unless this clip explicitly mentions incense. The companion sleeps completely still unless this clip explicitly mentions it. End close to the opening pose and ocean phase for a gentle loop; a short crossfade will be added in editing, so do not force an abrupt rewind. No new objects, morphing, extra limbs, floating pencil, liquid volume change, smoke through objects, moving furniture, sudden light pulse, text, logo or dialogue. Keep the action and primary moving prop inside the planned 9:16 crop corridor.

briefs.title: CapyChill 每日專輯｜深夜讀寫・Midnight Pages
briefs.focus: 10 首 × 約 3 分鐘＝約 30–35 分鐘
briefs.meta: 固定海邊書桌母場景 · 10 音樂＋1 概念圖＋6 段微動畫
briefs.summary: 本批目標 30 分鐘，安排 6 段不同微動作。先只生成第 1 條基準驗收片；確認海浪、倒影、角色結構與循環正常後，才生成其餘項目。規則：30 分鐘＝6 段；45 分鐘＝8 段；60 分鐘＝10 段。

items.purpose: 30 分鐘 YouTube Lo-fi 長片
items.text: Track 1/10 — "Opening the Window". Create a 3:00–3:30 instrumental lo-fi track for one cohesive 30-minute CapyChill album titled "深夜讀寫・Midnight Pages". Mood: deep focus, calm solitude, never gloomy. 70 BPM, 4/4, Rhodes piano and felt piano, warm restrained bass and soft brushed or tape-muted drums. Composition: simple four-chord welcome; introduce a small variation after 60 seconds, a calm B section near 1:30, then return to the main motif. Mix for long listening: no vocals, no spoken words, no dramatic drops, no piercing highs, no recognizable melody, no artist imitation. Leave gentle headroom and end cleanly with a 4–6 second natural tail. Environmental texture: subtle night room tone and faint sea wash, very low in the mix. This track must feel related to the other nine tracks without reusing the same lead melody.

items.purpose: 固定場景 reference
items.text: Create one high-resolution 16:9 hand-painted storybook master frame for CapyChill, ideally 3840×2160. Preserve the exact canonical composition across the entire channel: the same warm-brown capybara sits at the same wooden desk with the center of its head at about 64% of the image width, wearing the same cream headphones, facing left toward the same notebook; the same large window, desk lamp, mug, shelves and plants stay in identical positions. Camera is locked, eye-level, 35mm-equivalent wide view. Today’s album mood is 深夜讀寫・Midnight Pages; use navy night, warm amber pool of light, soft moon silver with clear moonlit night outside the same window. Calm original illustration, clean natural capybara anatomy. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, signature, sparkle icon or fake signage. Output one clean reference image, not a collage. Design three to five distinct animation opportunities into the still image without clutter: mug steam, curtain edge, two or three plant leaves, a thin incense stick with a small safe holder, and one tiny sleeping companion animal in a fixed bed. Each prop must have a clear resting position and must never compete with the capybara. COMPOSE FOR DUAL FORMAT: the full 16:9 frame must work as a YouTube video, and a narrow 9:16 portrait crop around the character must also work as a complete Shorts/Reels frame. The intended portrait crop spans approximately 44% to 76% of the original image width, centred near 60%. Do not draw crop guides. Inside that corridor, keep the entire head, headphones, writing paw, pencil, notebook, mug, and a tiny sleeping companion animal curled in a fixed cushion below the desk near the centre. Place the incense holder in a separate clear area just left of the notebook, with an unobstructed vertical column of air above it that never crosses the capybara silhouette, headphones, paw, mug or lamp. The portrait crop must still include a narrow slice of the window and sea, one warm light source and plant leaves, so it feels like a complete environment rather than a close-up cutout. Do not place essential storytelling details only at the far left and far right edges. Leave useful breathing room above the head and below the notebook for vertical-platform UI overlays; do not add text. This image will become an image-to-video reference, so keep clear separable layers for capybara, paws, pencil, notebook page, mug steam, incense smoke, pet, curtain, plants, window, sea, clouds and lights.

briefs.summary: 本批目標 30 分鐘，安排 6 段不同微動作。先只生成第 1 條基準驗收片；確認海浪、倒影、角色結構與循環正常後，才生成其餘項目。規則：30 分鐘＝6 段；45 分鐘＝8 段；60 分鐘＝10 段。

items.purpose: 30 分鐘 YouTube Lo-fi 長片
items.text: Track 1/10 — "Opening the Window". Create a 3:00–3:30 instrumental lo-fi track for one cohesive 30-minute CapyChill album titled "週末慢拍・A Very Slow Sunday". Mood: easygoing, cozy, gently playful. 70 BPM, 4/4, Rhodes piano and felt piano, warm restrained bass and soft brushed or tape-muted drums. Composition: simple four-chord welcome; introduce a small variation after 60 seconds, a calm B section near 1:30, then return to the main motif. Mix for long listening: no vocals, no spoken words, no dramatic drops, no piercing highs, no recognizable melody, no artist imitation. Leave gentle headroom and end cleanly with a 4–6 second natural tail. Environmental texture: light breeze, leaves and quiet café-like room tone without voices, very low in the mix. This track must feel related to the other nine tracks without reusing the same lead melody.

items.purpose: 固定場景 reference
items.text: Create one high-resolution 16:9 hand-painted storybook master frame for CapyChill, ideally 3840×2160. Preserve the exact canonical composition across the entire channel: the same warm-brown capybara sits at the same wooden desk with the center of its head at about 64% of the image width, wearing the same cream headphones, facing left toward the same notebook; the same large window, desk lamp, mug, shelves and plants stay in identical positions. Camera is locked, eye-level, 35mm-equivalent wide view. Today’s album mood is 週末慢拍・A Very Slow Sunday; use soft terracotta, cream, sun-washed blue with bright lazy afternoon at the same seaside room. Calm original illustration, clean natural capybara anatomy. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, signature, sparkle icon or fake signage. Output one clean reference image, not a collage. Design three to five distinct animation opportunities into the still image without clutter: mug steam, curtain edge, two or three plant leaves, a thin incense stick with a small safe holder, and one tiny sleeping companion animal in a fixed bed. Each prop must have a clear resting position and must never compete with the capybara. COMPOSE FOR DUAL FORMAT: the full 16:9 frame must work as a YouTube video, and a narrow 9:16 portrait crop around the character must also work as a complete Shorts/Reels frame. The intended portrait crop spans approximately 44% to 76% of the original image width, centred near 60%. Do not draw crop guides. Inside that corridor, keep the entire head, headphones, writing paw, pencil, notebook, mug, and a tiny sleeping companion animal curled in a fixed cushion below the desk near the centre. Place the incense holder in a separate clear area just left of the notebook, with an unobstructed vertical column of air above it that never crosses the capybara silhouette, headphones, paw, mug or lamp. The portrait crop must still include a narrow slice of the window and sea, one warm light source and plant leaves, so it feels like a complete environment rather than a close-up cutout. Do not place essential storytelling details only at the far left and far right edges. Leave useful breathing room above the head and below the notebook for vertical-platform UI overlays; do not add text. This image will become an image-to-video reference, so keep clear separable layers for capybara, paws, pencil, notebook page, mug steam, incense smoke, pet, curtain, plants, window, sea, clouds and lights.

briefs.meta: 固定海邊書桌母場景 · 10 音樂＋1 概念圖＋6 段微動畫
briefs.summary: 本批目標 30 分鐘，安排 6 段不同微動作。先只生成第 1 條基準驗收片；確認海浪、倒影、角色結構與循環正常後，才生成其餘項目。規則：30 分鐘＝6 段；45 分鐘＝8 段；60 分鐘＝10 段。

items.purpose: 30 分鐘 YouTube Lo-fi 長片
items.text: Track 1/10 — "Opening the Window". Create a 3:00–3:30 instrumental lo-fi track for one cohesive 30-minute CapyChill album titled "海邊黃昏・Slow Notes by the Bay". Mood: warm, unhurried, quietly optimistic. 70 BPM, 4/4, Rhodes piano and felt piano, warm restrained bass and soft brushed or tape-muted drums. Composition: simple four-chord welcome; introduce a small variation after 60 seconds, a calm B section near 1:30, then return to the main motif. Mix for long listening: no vocals, no spoken words, no dramatic drops, no piercing highs, no recognizable melody, no artist imitation. Leave gentle headroom and end cleanly with a 4–6 second natural tail. Environmental texture: soft sea breeze and distant water ambience, very low in the mix. This track must feel related to the other nine tracks without reusing the same lead melody.

items.purpose: 固定場景 reference
items.text: Create one high-resolution 16:9 hand-painted storybook master frame for CapyChill, ideally 3840×2160. Preserve the exact canonical composition across the entire channel: the same warm-brown capybara sits at the same wooden desk with the center of its head at about 64% of the image width, wearing the same cream headphones, facing left toward the same notebook; the same large window, desk lamp, mug, shelves and plants stay in identical positions. Camera is locked, eye-level, 35mm-equivalent wide view. Today’s album mood is 海邊黃昏・Slow Notes by the Bay; use peach sunset, muted ocean blue, warm walnut with clear golden-hour sky and calm sea. Calm original illustration, clean natural capybara anatomy. No text, letters, numbers, logos, watermark, signature, sparkle icon or fake signage. Output one clean reference image, not a collage. Design three to five distinct animation opportunities into the still image without clutter: mug steam, curtain edge, two or three plant leaves, a thin incense stick with a small safe holder, and one tiny sleeping companion animal in a fixed bed. Each prop must have a clear resting position and must never compete with the capybara. COMPOSE FOR DUAL FORMAT: the full 16:9 frame must work as a YouTube video, and a narrow 9:16 portrait crop around the character must also work as a complete Shorts/Reels frame. The intended portrait crop spans approximately 44% to 76% of the original image width, centred near 60%. Do not draw crop guides. Inside that corridor, keep the entire head, headphones, writing paw, pencil, notebook, mug, and a tiny sleeping companion animal curled in a fixed cushion below the desk near the centre. Place the incense holder in a separate clear area just left of the notebook, with an unobstructed vertical column of air above it that never crosses the capybara silhouette, headphones, paw, mug or lamp. The portrait crop must still include a narrow slice of the window and sea, one warm light source and plant leaves, so it feels like a complete environment rather than a close-up cutout. Do not place essential storytelling details only at the far left and far right edges. Leave useful breathing room above the head and below the notebook for vertical-platform UI overlays; do not add text. This image will become an image-to-video reference, so keep clear separable layers for capybara, paws, pencil, notebook page, mug steam, incense smoke, pet, curtain, plants, window, sea, clouds and lights.

STATIC STRUCTURE: locked camera; window frame, desk, shelves, lamp hardware, furniture, headphones and room geometry do not move. Preserve the character's identity, proportions and silhouette. No cut, zoom, pan or parallax. MANDATORY BASE ENVIRONMENT MOTION THROUGHOUT THE ENTIRE CLIP: the ocean is visibly alive, not a still photograph. Several small wave bands travel naturally toward shore; fine ripples change continuously; the golden reflection on the water shimmers softly in response to those ripples. Motion remains slow, subtle and physically consistent—never frozen, reversed, pulsing or moving as one flat sheet. Distant clouds drift less than one percent of the frame width. CHARACTER/PROP ACTION FOR THIS CLIP ONLY: The capybara remains still. One thin incense smoke trail rises within its own clear air column and never overlaps the character; the sleeping companion takes one slow breath and makes one tiny ear twitch. Preserve the clear weather in the reference; do not create rain, snow, storms or new weather effects. The mug is still unless this clip explicitly mentions steam. The incense is unlit and produces no smoke unless this clip explicitly mentions incense. The companion sleeps completely still unless this clip explicitly mentions it. End close to the opening pose and ocean phase for a gentle loop; a short crossfade will be added in editing, so do not force an abrupt rewind. No new objects, morphing, extra limbs, floating pencil, liquid volume change, smoke through objects, moving furniture, sudden light pulse, text, logo or dialogue. Keep the action and primary moving prop inside the planned 9:16 crop corridor.
